posts.author: MoorvaleGardener92
posts.text: Hi everyone, I need a bit of help urgently! Someone claiming to be from the bank has sent me a message via [link removed] asking for my security code and full password to verify my account. Please don't click that link or share any details!
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting scam asking for sensitive security codes and passwords, which requires immediate removal to prevent account compromise.
